k10_init_screen.tooltip: Initialize UNIHIKER K10 screen and create canvas

k10_draw_line.message0: draw line from X %1 Y %2 to X %3 Y %4 color %5

k10_draw_circle.message0: draw circle center X %1 Y %2 radius %3 border color %4 fill color %5 fill %6

k10_draw_rectangle.message0: draw rectangle X %1 Y %2 width %3 height %4 border color %5 fill color %6 fill %7

k10_draw_text_simple.tooltip: Show text on the specified line (1~7), auto-laid out

k10_draw_text.message0: show text %1 X %2 Y %3 color %4 font %5 chars per line %6
k10_draw_text.tooltip: Show text at specified position. chars per line: 25 for font 16, 10 for font 24.

k10_draw_bitmap.message0: show built-in image %1 X %2 Y %3 width %4 height %5
k10_draw_bitmap.tooltip: Show built-in image (provide arduino_image_cache.h with the image array, e.g. image_data1)

k10_draw_image.message0: show TF card image path %1 X %2 Y %3
k10_draw_image.tooltip: Load and show image from TF card

k10_clear_canvas_row.tooltip: Clear one canvas row (1-7), then refresh the canvas if needed

k10_clear_qrcode.tooltip: Clear the QR code shown on the screen

k10_animation.tooltip: Upload a GIF or MP4 and convert it to K10 canvas animation frames

k10_play_animation.message0: K10 play animation X %1 Y %2 animation %3 mode %4
k10_play_animation.tooltip: Play a K10 animation; each frame refreshes the canvas, and non-blocking mode must run repeatedly in loop

k10_draw_animation_frame.message0: K10 show animation frame X %1 Y %2 animation %3 frame %4
k10_draw_animation_frame.tooltip: Show the specified K10 animation frame; the frame number is clamped to the valid range

k10_animation_frame_count.message0: get total frame count of K10 animation %1
k10_animation_frame_count.tooltip: Get the total frame count of a K10 animation

k10_step_animation_frame.message0: move frame variable %1 one step toward target frame %2 frame count %3 direction %4
k10_step_animation_frame.tooltip: Move a frame variable by one frame; forward and backward wrap around, and auto chooses the direction
